info.name: Nelvora Spell Fixes
info.description: Custom Spells for the Nelvora setting
info.author: RiverDoge

description.p: The next time you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack during this spell's duration, your weapon flares with bright light, and the attack deals an extra 4d8 fire damage to the target. Additionally, your attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 for the duration of the spell.
At Higher Levels. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the extra damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
